Command.Description: Inclination Hold, Increment Turn Correction (More Right)
Inclination Hold, Decrement Turn Correction (More Left)
Go to Page 0 with MTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
Go to Page 2: IH Mode (with no turn)
Go to Page 1: Hold Vertical Mode

Increase Target INC by 0.2 deg instantaneous

Go to Page 2: IH Mode (with no turn)
Go to Page 0 with GTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
Go to Page 0 with MTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
RESET AutoCurve TARGET Inc and TARGET Azi (to current cont inc & azi)
Set AutoCurve Target DLS 0deg/100ft (sets HIA Mode for Tangent in curve)
Set AutoCurve Target DLS 8deg/100ft (default entry condition)
Set TF = 0 degrees (default entry condition - High Side GTF)
ROPestimator - switch ON (overridden by sending manual ROP)
ROP estimator - Nudge the max DLS by + 1 deg/100 ft
ROP estimator - Nudge the max DLS by - 1 deg/100 ft
Down Hole Drill State (DHDS) - Manual ON
Down Hole Drill State (DHDS) - Manual OFF
Go to Page 5: ROP Auto-return Page
Go to Page 2: IH Mode (with no turn)
Go to Page 0 with GTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
Go to Page 0 with MTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
Go to Page 0 with GTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
Go to Page 0 with MTF neutral setting: TF = 0 degrees, SR = 0%
FRAME SET 1 (low detail azimuthal gamma) - MAX15 Only
FRAME SET 2 (low detail average gamma) - MAX15 Only
FRAME SET 3 (high detail average gamma) - MAX15 Only
FRAME SET 4 (high detail 4 bin azi gamma) - MAX15 Only
FRAME SET 5 (high detail 8 bin azi gamma) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION OFF (TELEMETRY OFF) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 1 (DQPSK 0.5 Hz / 0.5 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 2 (DQPSK 0.5 Hz / 1 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 3 (DQPSK 0.625 Hz / 0.625 bps) - MAX15 Only

SET MODULATION RATE 5 (DQPSK 1 Hz / 0.5 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 6 (DQPSK 1 Hz / 1 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 7 (DQPSK 1 Hz /2 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 8 (BPSK 0.5 Hz / 0.5 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 9 (BPSK 0.625 Hz / 0.625 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 10 (BPSK 1 Hz / 0.5 bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 11 (BPSK 1 Hz / 1 bps) - MAX15 Only
No action - Exits engineering page and returns to previous steering page

Enable or Disable single downlink page mode

SET MODULATION RATE 20 (DQPSK 4 Hz / 2bps) - MAX15 Only
SET MODULATION RATE 21 (DQPSK 4 Hz / 4bps) - MAX15 Only

ROPestimator - switch ON (overridden by sending manual ROP)
ROP estimator - Nudge the max DLS by + 1 deg/100 ft
ROP estimator - Nudge the max DLS by - 1 deg/100 ft
